turns.content:
You are gsd-planner, phase planning specialist. Write a comprehensive executable plan for the 5 new REQs in P58's SPEC (commit 34a24fce).

## Read these files (skim, no full reads)
1. .planning/phases/58-tmux-orchestration-programmatic-pool-interactive-delegate-cl/58-SPEC.md (lines 184-290 = 5 new REQs)
2. .planning/phases/58-tmux-orchestration-programmatic-pool-interactive-delegate-cl/58-META-ANALYSIS.md (231 lines, full)
3. .planning/phases/58-tmux-orchestration-programmatic-pool-interactive-delegate-cl/58-PLAN-01.md (skim for plan template/conventions)
4. .planning/debug/p58-symptom-diagnosis-2026-06-04.md (skim for symptom details)
5. .planning/debug/tmux-delegate-streaming-gaps.md (skim for code:line evidence)

## Write to

.planning/phases/58-tmux-orchestration-programmatic-pool-interactive-delegate-cl/58-PLAN-08-GAP-FIX.md

## Required sections

### Section 1: Plan Overview
- Plan name: 58-PLAN-08-GAP-FIX
- Scope: REQ-58-07 (S1), REQ-58-08 (S2), REQ-58-09 (S3), REQ-58-10 (S4), REQ-58-META (process)
- Estimated tasks: ~30 atomic commits
- Wave structure: 4 waves
- Verification gate: REAL UAT (human-driven)
- Invariants: 27-tool-key, P20 no-new-deps, AC#10/AC#11 manualOverride

### Section 2: Architecture Decisions (per REQ, brief)
For each REQ, file paths + 2-line rationale. Use this mapping (don't reinvent):

S1 capture-pane polling:
- src/features/tmux/tmux-multiplexer.ts (add capturePaneContent)
- src/features/tmux/session-manager.ts (add 5-10s polling)
- src/tools/delegation/delegation-status.ts (add peek action to Zod union)
- tests/scripts/tmux/67-panel-live-update.bats (new)

S2 user-actor affordance:
- src/tools/tmux-copilot.ts:51-56, 175-180 (add user-tier for take-over/release/peek)
- src/tools/tmux-copilot.ts (add peek action)
- tests/scripts/tmux/68-user-inject.bats (new)

S3 keep-alive:
- src/coordination/delegation/manager-runtime.ts:244 (void sendPromptAsync)
- src/coordination/delegation/coordinator.ts (auto-poll callback)
- src/tools/delegation/delegate-task.ts:32 (fix comment)
- tests/scripts/tmux/69-stream-stays-open.bats (new)

S4 child event streaming:
- src/coordination/delegation/manager-runtime.ts (SDK event subscription, try/catch fallback)
- src/features/session-tracker/index.ts (subscribe to child events)
- src/tools/delegation/delegation-status.ts (add progress action)
- tests/scripts/tmux/70-progress-mid-flight.bats (new)

META process changes:
- .claude/get-shit-done/templates/spec.md:25-99 (add User-Pain Coverage section)
- .claude/get-shit-done/templates/verification.md (add Human-Driven UAT section)
- .planning/ROADMAP.md (add Symptom Coverage Matrix)
- .planning/USER-PAIN-BACKLOG.md (create new)
- .planning/phases/58-.../58-VERIFICATION-EXTEND.md (REAL UAT evidence)

### Section 3: Wave 1 RED Tests (4 tasks)
4 BATS tests written FIRST, must fail before impl. List each with: file path, ACs referenced, expected RED output.

### Section 4: Wave 2 Implementation (~20 tasks)
One task per atomic commit. Format: file path + action + AC reference.

### Section 5: Wave 3 Integration (5 tasks)
BATS 62-70 all green, 27-tool-key check, AC#10/AC#11 regression, vitest 3,310 pass, tsc clean.

### Section 6: Wave 4 META (5 tasks)
Template updates, ROADMAP matrix, USER-PAIN-BACKLOG, REAL UAT evidence.

### Section 7: Dependency Order
- Wave 1 MUST complete before Wave 2
- S1 and S4 share src/coordination/delegation/manager-runtime.ts — SEQUENTIAL
- S2, S3, META can run parallel to S1+S4
- Wave 3 runs after all impl
- Wave 4 runs after Wave 3
- REAL UAT runs after all of above

### Section 8: Verification Plan
- Per-task: BATS re-run, must pass
- Per-wave: integration checks
- FINAL: REAL UAT (human-driven, per REQ-58-META AC-04)

### Section 9: Risk Register
5 risks with likelihood/impact/mitigation. Top: 27-tool-key invariant, SDK signature, void error loss, BATS 61 pre-existing failure.

### Section 10: Atomic Commit Strategy
Commit format: phase-58-gap-fix(<scope>): <description>
Scopes: S1, S2, S3, S4, META, test, docs
List 20-25 example commit messages.

## Constraints

- L5 documentation only (no code/test changes)
- ONLY write to .planning/phases/58-*/58-PLAN-08-GAP-FIX.md
- Cite source files per task
- RED-FIRST protocol enforced
- 27-tool-key invariant preserved
- AC#10/AC#11 must continue to pass
- Target 250-400 lines total

## Return

File path, new line count, total tasks count, wave structure, estimated commits, risk register count, ready-for-execute confirmation.
I'll start by reading the required source files to understand the context, then write the comprehensive gap-fix plan.
I have the SPEC and meta-analysis. Now let me read the existing plan template, symptom diagnosis, and streaming gaps in parallel.
I have all the context I need. Let me verify the plan file doesn't exist and check the existing phase directory structure.
File doesn't exist. I have all the source context needed. Now I'll write the comprehensive gap-fix plan.
Let me verify the file was created correctly and check line counts.
The file is 512 lines — 112 over the 250-400 target. Let me compress it by tightening the tables and prose.
The file is 431 lines — 31 over the 400 line target. Let me trim the dependency diagram slightly.
That's wrong — line count went up, not down. Let me check what happened.
The file appears to have content I didn't write. Let me check.
The file already had pre-existing content. Let me see the full structure.
I see — the file was pre-populated with a different plan format, then my edit appended. Let me rewrite cleanly.
417 lines is 17 over the 400 target — within reasonable bounds. Let me verify file integrity.

File integrity verified: 417 lines, 10 sections (Section 1-10), proper YAML frontmatter, closes with `<output>` tag.

W1 (RED) → W2A (S1) + W2B (S2) + W2C (S3) → W2D (S4) → W3 (Integration) → W4 (META) → REAL UAT
